head: 770c239eb8cce7d954fc45ae932d4134837b18df
notes: wall clock launch->pre-merge-gate from session transcript (21:36:49->21:47:06); 16min operator idle occurred post-gate (phone call) and is excluded; operator accidentally approved gate after idle - integration branch intact, not merged; cost from transcript token counts, cache-discounted (writes x1.25, reads x0.1); weekly pct display granularity 1pt so delta 1.0 means 0-2; engine judgment call at launch: workflow resolved via scriptPath not by-name; weekly-pct delta decomposed from local transcripts (API-equiv in window): run session $10.29 (71%), orchestrator session $3.92 (27%), unrelated vibes-diy $0.35 (2%) -> run-attributable delta ~0.7 of the 1.0pt measured; raw weekly_pct kept as measured

head: 4e9f7a7af1f378a55be1c00127bb2404103825ac
notes: wall clock launch->pre-merge-gate from session transcript (22:20:28->22:28:11); gate Esc'd without approval per protocol, so run dir was still on main at scoring - scored via --branch; cost from transcript token counts (15 subagents), cache-discounted (writes x1.25, reads x0.1); weekly-pct delta decomposed from local transcripts: run $13.17 (77%), orchestrator session $3.95 (23%) -> run-attributable ~0.77 of the 1.0pt measured, granularity 1pt; engine judgment call at launch: workflow resolved via scriptPath not by-name (same as degrade-B-1)
